title: Restone'd Torches
description: Adds the orange hue back into the new redstone torch (and adjacent) models
body:
![Restone'd Torches Logo](https://i.imgur.com/9CDs40T.png)
**This pack works on versions 1.14 - 24w33a. IGNORE THE WARNING FOR VERSIONS OLDER THAN 24w33a. IT WILL WORK**

Adds back the orange hue to the newly revealed redstone torch model (and all blocks that use it)

```

```


### HOW TO USE

Download the pack.

Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder. *(Unzipping is optional.)*

Open your Minecraft Launcher and launch your version of Minecraft.

It's now ready to be used!

 

 

*<sub>This pack was originally posted on my [PMC](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/restone-d-torches), go check it out!</sub>*
